# tfe_projects

This data source can be used to retrieve all projects in an organization.

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `organization` (String) Name of the organization. If omitted, organization must be defined in the provider config.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `projects` (List of Object) List of Projects in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `organization` (String)
